title: Support nonconsecutive repetition [=N] in sequence expressions

features.name: SVA nonconsecutive repetition operator in sequence expression
features.description: Code should include an SVA assertion using the nonconsecutive repetition operator [=N] within a sequence expression

features.name: SVA sequence with implication operator
features.description: Code should include an SVA property expression using implication operators (|-> or |=>) with a sequence on the left-hand side

features.name: SVA nonconsecutive repetition with count range [=M:N]
features.description: Code should include an SVA nonconsecutive repetition operator [=N] used in a sequence expression within a concurrent assertion property
features.snippet:
logic a, b;
assert property (@(posedge clk) a[=1:3] |-> b);
